purpose: Second W3 physical/foundation concrete action-value producer, covering the first-specialist Knight/Archer pair.

knight_output_stacking_rule.rule: same output-pressure channel per outgoing action; use the strongest single active multiplier and do not multiply Rend Weapon with Rend Power
knight_output_stacking_rule.rend_magick_channel: separate magic/healing output channel; non-stacking within that channel

knight_actions.name: Guarded Strike
knight_actions.limits: current weapon only; next incoming direct weapon hit before Knight's next turn is reduced by 15%; does not stack with itself

knight_actions.name: Rend Weapon
knight_actions.limits: armed enemies only; does not delete inventory equipment; does not compound multiplicatively with Rend Power on the same target, stronger applicable physical-output reduction applies

knight_actions.name: Rend Armor
knight_actions.duration: next two physical hits or target's next turn, whichever comes first
knight_actions.limits: non-stacking; setup action, not universal party requirement

knight_actions.name: Shield Break
knight_actions.duration: next two direct attacks or target's next turn, whichever comes first
knight_actions.limits: only shield/weapon guard layers; does not erase class or accessory evasion; deliberate guard-break naming because it targets evasion layers rather than a stat or output value

knight_actions.name: Rend MP
knight_actions.limits: anti-caster resource pressure; no HP burst plan

knight_actions.name: Rend Power
knight_actions.limits: weaker than Rend Weapon against armed targets but broader; does not compound multiplicatively with Rend Weapon on the same target, stronger applicable physical-output reduction applies

knight_actions.name: Rend Magick
knight_actions.limits: separate magic/healing-output axis; does not prevent casting and does not replace Silence

knight_actions.name: Crushing Blow
knight_actions.limits: uses fists or other current crush route; below Monk's protected fist identity

knight_actions.name: Rend Helm
knight_actions.limits: may split out later only by dividing the existing Rend Armor exposure budget, not by adding another stacking vulnerability

knight_actions.name: Challenge
knight_actions.limits: no hard taunt or boss lock accepted in this pass

archer_actions.name: Quick Shot
archer_actions.limits: bow/crossbow only; lower expected damage than normal shot at ordinary hit rates

archer_actions.name: Aimed Shot
archer_actions.limits: fails if target leaves the chosen panel or line; same-tick unsafe; uses normal Charging self-risk while queued

archer_actions.name: Pinning Shot
archer_actions.limits: no Stop, no Immobilize, no hard lock

archer_actions.name: Piercing Shot
archer_actions.limits: bow/crossbow only; line or exposed-target requirement; does not help guns; uses normal Charging self-risk while queued

archer_actions.name: High-Ground Shot
archer_actions.limits: map-dependent; no bonus on flat maps

archer_actions.name: Covering Shot
archer_actions.limits: no overwatch lock accepted in this pass

rsm_boundary_values.Parry: deferred to RSM/T4/T6xPS producer; must be weapon/facing/equipment bounded
rsm_boundary_values.Equip Armor: deferred to RSM/equipment producer; doc 51 band C
rsm_boundary_values.Equip Shield: deferred to RSM/equipment producer; doc 51 band C
rsm_boundary_values.Concentration: deferred to RSM/T4 producer; must not mean all attacks always hit
rsm_boundary_values.Equip Bow: deferred to RSM/equipment producer; doc 51 band C
rsm_boundary_values.Bow Mastery: deferred to RSM/F5 producer; bow/crossbow only

early_unlock_warning_damage.read: If Knight/Archer appear too early, their basic attacks already beat starter Squire texture; this supports Band B first-specialist timing.

rows.effect: Rend Weapon plus Rend Power same action

review_questions: Are Knight action values useful enough for active Knight before Equip Armor/Shield exports?
Is Rend Armor's armor-specific delta capped at 1.20 too setup-efficient or appropriately modest?
Does Shield Break respect T4 by only reducing shield/weapon guard layers?
Do Rend MP, Rend Speed, Rend Power, and Rend Magick cover the vanilla stat-down family without replacing Mystic, Time Mage, Orator, or caster-control jobs?
Are Archer's Quick/Aimed/Pinning/Piercing/High-Ground values enough to make active Archer useful without making Concentration necessary?
Should Challenge and Covering Shot remain deferred, or is a bounded concrete value needed now?
